assessment.note: He names a real growth gap — defaulting to safe execution despite some independent calls — while showing clear self-awareness about the pattern.

new_queue.label: Safe execution
new_queue.name: You said 'being safe' — what does that look like in practice?
new_queue.description: Drills into the specific behaviour behind his 'safe' pattern before moving on.

new_queue.label: Safety mode
new_queue.name: What makes it easier to stay in execution mode rather than push the decision earlier?
new_queue.description: Surfaces the forces that keep him from leaning into broader Principal behavior.

new_queue.label: Early alignment
new_queue.name: What do you usually want to have settled before you bring others in?
new_queue.description: Probes how he approaches expectation alignment and whether he waits too long to surface uncertainty.

new_queue.label: Commitment closer
new_queue.name: What will you do differently on early alignment before we next meet?
new_queue.description: Closes on a specific behavioral commitment tied to the feedback theme.
